name: The Tasting Room
deal: Date Night Special — Spaghetti and Meatballs for two with a glass of wine each for R215 per couple, all day
howToClaim: Visit any Tasting Room branch on a Monday or Tuesday and ask for the Date Night special. All day, no booking required.

name: Hussar Grill
deal: Date Night Set Menu — 2 courses for R499 per couple or 3 courses for R599 per couple. Includes a bottle of wine or two soft drinks.
howToClaim: Call to book your table. Ask to be transferred to your nearest branch as there are multiple locations.

name: Kream (Montecasino)
deal: Date Night — R850 per couple with a complimentary bottle of champagne. Monday and Tuesday evenings only.
howToClaim: Book a table in advance — this is an exclusive offer and fills up quickly on Monday and Tuesday evenings.

name: Mythos Greek Restaurant
deal: Date Night set menu for two — starter, two mains, and dessert from R395 per couple on weeknights
howToClaim: Book via the Mythos website or call ahead. Ask for the Date Night set menu when seated

name: The Entertainer App
deal: 2-for-1 mains at hundreds of participating restaurants across SA — pay for one, second one is free
howToClaim: Download The Entertainer app (free via FNB Gold and above, or R499/year). Browse and redeem at checkout

name: News Cafe
deal: Happy Hour cocktails from R49 and 2-for-1 shooters between 5pm and 7pm, Monday to Friday
howToClaim: Visit any News Cafe between 17:00 and 19:00 on weeknights. Prices apply automatically at the bar

name: Assaggi Ristorante
deal: Complimentary glass of house wine with any two-course dinner — present a printed reservation confirmation
howToClaim: Book online via their website and print or show your confirmation. Valid for dinner service only

name: Panarottis
deal: Pizza for Two special — two medium pizzas and two Cokes from R189 every Tuesday and Wednesday
howToClaim: Visit any Panarottis on Tuesdays or Wednesdays and ask for the Pizza for Two deal at the till

name: Primi Piatti
deal: Happy Hour drinks at 50% off, plus complimentary olives and bread for the table before 6:30pm
howToClaim: Arrive before 18:30 on weeknights. Happy Hour pricing applies automatically at the bar
